name: ValidateSubscriptionData
businessLogic: Check if featureType is 'OpenAccount'; if not, skip all validation.
Retrieve ReferenceContractDTO from SlotsDTO using REFERENCE_CONTRACT_PARAMS key; throw FbpApplicationException with UNABLE_TO_RETRIEVE_CONTRACT_FROM_SOURCE_SYSTEM if null.
Retrieve AccountDTO from SlotsDTO using ACCOUNT_IDENTITY key.
Insert ReferenceContractDTO and AccountDTO as facts into Clara rules session and fire rules.
Query Clara rules for subscription validation result; if result is ':INVALID_INTEREST_TYPE', throw FbpValidationException with INVALID_INTEREST_TYPE.
If result is ':COMPOUNDING_FREQUENCY_NOT_ALLOWED', throw FbpValidationException with COMPOUNDING_FREQUENCY_NOT_ALLOWED.
If result is ':COMPOUNDING_FREQUENCY_REQUIRED', throw FbpValidationException with COMPOUNDING_FREQUENCY_REQUIRED.
If result is null or empty, interest and compounding validation passes.
Retrieve AccountDTO from SlotsDTO for statement preferences validation; if AccountDTO or accountStatementPreferences is null, skip statement validation.
Insert AccountDTO as fact into Clara rules session and fire rules for statement preferences.
Query Clara rules for statement validation result; if result is ':STATEMENT_FIELDS_NOT_ALLOWED', throw FbpValidationException with STATEMENT_FIELDS_NOT_ALLOWED_WHEN_TYPE_IS_NONE.
If result is null or empty, statement preferences validation passes.
